design_philosophy: A bleeding-edge, futuristic cyberpunk web operating system. UI relies on deep indigo/void gray backgrounds, layered glassmorphic panels, thin glowing borders, and high-contrast neon accents used functionally rather than decoratively.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use absolute positioning with Framer Motion for draggable windows, and a CSS Grid bento-box inside windows for dashboard layouts.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous inner padding for glassmorphism. p-6 or p-8 for large cards, p-4 for nested elements.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main windows, rounded-lg for internal elements, rounded-full for pills/buttons.

window_container.description: Draggable, resizable OS window module using Framer Motion.
window_container.styles: bg-[#0A0A0F]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
window_container.header: h-10 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing bg-white/5

sidebar_dock.styles: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col items-center py-4 gap-4

neon_button.styles: relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-all hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/20 hover:border-[#00F0FF] hover:text-[#00F0FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)]

glass_card.styles: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-md border border-white/[0.05] rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]

motion_and_interactions.window_spawn: Scale up from 0.95, fade in opacity 0 to 1, easeOut 0.2s
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and border color shift to neon accent
motion_and_interactions.background_animation: Use tsparticles for a subtle floating node grid, or a slow CSS gradient mesh shift behind the main desktop.

backgrounds.description: Abstract scene with blue neon lights and geometric shapes

avatars.description: Futuristic cyber woman with AI-inspired eyewear

filler_images.description: Vibrant Tokyo cityscape at night with neon lights

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with Vite, install tailwindcss, framer-motion, lucide-react, recharts, and tsparticles.
Implement a global store (using Context or Zustand) to manage the OS state: opened windows, active window z-index, pinned apps, user settings, authentication state.
Create a modular 'Window' component using Framer Motion (<motion.div drag dragConstraints>) that renders content dynamically based on the active app.
Build the Desktop background with an animated particle grid or gradient mesh.

Build the Sidebar/Dock mapping to all required apps (Dashboard, AI Chat, Image Gen, Voice Assistant, Memory, Notes, Tasks, Calendar, Music, Video, File Manager, Code, Finance, Analytics, Discord/Chat, Browser).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for OS core structure, and integrate custom components for the complex modules.
Implement Command Palette (Cmd+K) using a library like cmDK, styled with glassmorphism.
Ensure the application strictly follows the neon cyberpunk aesthetic without becoming overwhelmingly bright; rely heavily on the dark void background (#05050A).
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as defined in the rules (e.g., data-testid='dock-item-chat', data-testid='window-close-button').
Apply the requested Unbounded (Headings), Outfit (Body), and JetBrains Mono (Code/Accents) fonts by including them via Google Fonts in index.html.
Build the complete hybrid full-stack suite of modules as specified in the problem statement.
